name: Yangtze Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix marinade ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add chicken and mix well to coat.
3. Marinate for at least 1 hour in the refrigerator.
4. Alternate chicken and pineapple pieces on skewers.
5. Grill 1 to 2 minutes on each side or to desired doneness.
